name: com.kobic.storekit
description: AAA-quality Unity IAP wrapper for mobile. UniTask-based async API, works in the Editor with a simulated store, full product/purchase/restore support, default device popups (overridable), analytics hooks, and extendable store/product controllers. Unity IAP is an optional dependency — install whichever version you need (the package falls back to a simulated store when it is absent).

samples.description: A ready-to-run demo scene plus example store/product controllers built on StoreKit's extendable base classes. Press Play to shop against the simulated store.
